debug_info.goal:
S : Set ℝ
h₁ : S = {x | (¬∃ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 70, x = ↑n) ∧ 5 / 4 ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 70, ↑k / (x - ↑k)}
⊢ ∃ l r n,
    (∀ k < n, l k < r k) ∧
      (∀ k < n - 1, r k < l (k + 1)) ∧
        ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (r k - l k) = 1988 ∧ S = ⋃ k ∈ Finset.range n, Set.Ioc (l k) (r k)

  by_contra h
  exact h (by
    refine ⟨fun _ => 0, fun _ => 0, 0, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩

    · intro k hk; exact (Nat.lt_asymm hk hk).elim

classical
  refine ⟨(fun _ => (0 : ℝ)), (fun _ => (1988 : ℝ)), 1, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro k hk
    have : k = 0 := by
      have hk' : k < 1 := hk
      exact Nat.lt_one_iff.mp hk'
    subst this
    norm_num
  · intro k hk
    exfalso
    have : ¬ k < 0 := Nat.not_lt_zero k
    exact this hk
  · simp
  · subst h₁
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      refine ?_
      have : (x : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioc (0 : ℝ) (1988 : ℝ) := by
        have : 0 < (1988 : ℝ) := by norm_num
        have hx' : (x : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
          intro h
          have : (x : ℝ) ∈ ({x : ℝ |
              (¬∃ n : ℕ, n ∈ Finset.Icc (1 : ℕ) 70 ∧ x = n) ∧
                5 / 4 ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc (1 : ℕ) 70, (k : ℝ) / (x - k)}) := hx
          exact False.elim (by simpa [h] using this.2)
        refine ⟨?_, le_of_lt this⟩
        have : (0 : ℝ) < (1988 : ℝ) := by norm_num
        exact lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_lt this) (Ne.symm hx')
      simpa using this
    · intro hx
      refine ?_
      have : (x : ℝ) ∈ {x : ℝ |
          (¬∃ n : ℕ, n ∈ Finset.Icc (1 : ℕ) 70 ∧ x = n) ∧
            5 / 4 ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc (1 : ℕ) 70, (k : ℝ) / (x - k)} := by
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · intro hn
          rcases hn with ⟨n, hnI, rfl⟩
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by
            have hn1 : (1 : ℕ) ≤ n := (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hnI).1
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn1)
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := this
          have hx0 : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := this
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := hx0
          exact (lt_irrefl (n : ℝ)) (by
            have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := this
            exact this)
        · have : (5 : ℝ) / 4 ≤ (5 : ℝ) / 4 := le_rfl
          exact le_trans this (le_of_eq (by simp))
      simpa using this
